title: Payment amounts - Canada Groceries and Essentials Benefit - Canada.ca
content:
Canada Groceries and Essentials Benefit
Amount for an eligible individual
Amount for an eligible spouse
Amount for each eligible child under 19
Amount for the first eligible child in a single parent family
Additional amount for single individual
Phase-in threshold for the additional amount for single individual without children
2025 ( July 2026 - June 2027)
2024 (July 2025 - June 2026)
2023 (July 2024 - June 2025)
2022 (July 2023 - June 2024)
